data/maps/MauvilleCity_Mart/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Mart_Text_ItemsToTemporaril:
There are items that temporarily
elevate the stats of POKéMON.\pThe ones I know you use in battle
are X ATTACK and X DEFEND...\pI do believe that there are others
like them.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Mart/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Mart_Text_DecisionsDetermin: Use a certain move, or use an item\ninstead...\pThe TRAINER's decisions determine how\nbattles turn out, I think.
